title: WRD Configuration Errors—Other Problems When Using Browser
breadcrumbs: WRD Configuration Errors—Other Problems When Using Browser
text: WRD Configuration Errors—Other Problems When Using Browser Depending on the specific error, here are some possible causes. Symptom: Enter Network Password dialog pops up when opening a Web page. The dialog also indicates: Realm RealmName Possible cause Resolution AUTHORIZATION is set to RealmName in the servlet properties of the URD servlet. Remove the AUTHORIZATION servlet property of the URD servlet. Incorrect Authentication Method set in the web server. Start Internet Service Manager and open Properties window of the item Default Web Site. Select the tab Directory Security. Click Edit for Anonymous Access and Authentication Control . Only the Allow Anonymous Access check box should be selected. Symptom: Image on Server Page is not displayed in picture control. With view source of HTML page, a line appears such as: Explain this code Copy Possible cause Resolution The RESOURCEDIR setting of the URD Servlet Alias is not set to the correct location, for example c:/webapps/wasvwww /resources is set while c:/webapps/wasvwww /resource exists. Specify correct match between RESOURCEDIR and the resources directory. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
